name: function 1
data to send
query:
from(bucket: "SmartClass")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "classroom_control")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._field == "led" or
      r._field == "projector" or
      r._field == "ac"
  )
  |> last()

name: function 2
Schedule
query:
from(bucket: "SmartClass")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "classroom_schedule")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Monday")
  |> last()
